name: Vincent - Wallet
description: AI agent wallet management via Vincent CLI — pay for skills, manage credits, and handle x402 micropayments seamlessly.
review: High-demand wallet skill (4028 downloads). Instruction-only by design — delegates to @vincentai/cli npm package. x402 micropayment model is well-implemented. SKILL.md version cosmetically mismatches published version but functionality is solid.
notes: Requires @vincentai/cli npm package. Uses x402 micropayment credits.
